Funding

Support for YACL research

YACL's research is made possible through the generous support of government agencies, foundations, and industry partners committed to advancing cryptography and security.

For funding inquiries, please contact us at yaleappliedcrypto@gmail.com.

This page is maintained manually. To add a funding source, edit _pages/funding.md.

Yale Applied Cryptography Laboratory

Department of Computer Science
Yale University

yaleappliedcrypto@gmail.com
